Services

Everything glass, handled.

From a once-a-year refresh to a standing seasonal route, here's what we bring the ladder for.

Interior & exterior windows

Full-pane cleaning, edge to edge, with a finish that holds up to Indiana sun.

Screens & tracks

Screens rinsed, tracks and sills de-gunked — the parts everyone forgets about.

Hard water & mineral removal

Sprinkler spots and mineral haze, gently lifted without damaging the glass.

Storm windows & skylights

The awkward, hard-to-reach glass — done safely, no ladder-leaning-on-siding required.

Storefronts & small business

Weekly, biweekly, or monthly storefront routes for Greenwood shops and offices.

Move-in / move-out clean

A one-time deep clean before keys change hands, inside and out.

Our work

Recent jobs around Greenwood.

A look at what "streak-free" actually looks like — homes, storefronts, and everything in between.

Jaxson & Gabi
About us

A husband-and-wife business, built right here in Greenwood.

Lovelace Window Cleaning is run by Jaxson and Gabi Lovelace — not a franchise, not a call center, just the two of us and a small crew we trust. We started this business in 2024 because we wanted to bring old-fashioned, show-up-when-we-say-we-will service to a town we care about.

When you call or send a quote request, chances are you're talking directly to one of us. We treat every home like it's in our own neighborhood — because most of the time, it is.

Husband & wife owned
Est. 2024 in Greenwood, IN
Hands-on, every job

01

Send your details

03

On the day of, we clean, tidy up after ourselves, and leave the glass invisible.

FAQ

Questions we hear a lot.

Can't find your answer here? Send us a message on the quote form below or give us a call.

Most Greenwood homes do well with a cleaning twice a year — once in spring to clear off winter grime, and once in fall before the holidays. Homes near busy roads, farmland, or with lots of trees nearby often benefit from a quarterly visit instead.

Yes. Interior and exterior cleaning is included in a standard visit. If you'd only like the outside done, just let us know when you request your quote and we'll adjust the price.

Pricing depends on the number of windows, stories, and how dirty the glass is. That's why every quote is free and based on your specific home — fill out the form below and we'll follow up same-day with a straightforward price, no surprises.

Not necessarily. As long as we can access the exterior of your home and, if interior cleaning is included, get inside at the scheduled time, you're welcome to run errands while we work.

Light rain after we finish won't undo the work — a proper cleaning sheets water off rather than leaving spots. If heavy rain or storms are expected during your appointment, we'll reach out to reschedule at no charge.

Yes, screen and track cleaning can be added to any visit. It's the detail work that gets skipped most often, and it makes the biggest difference in how a window actually looks up close.

Yes, we're fully insured. That protects you and your property, and it's something worth asking any window cleaner before letting them on a ladder at your home.

We're based in Greenwood, Indiana and regularly serve Bargersville, Center Grove, Whiteland, Franklin, and the south side of Indianapolis. Not seeing your neighborhood? Reach out anyway — we're always adding stops to the route.
